summary: Iteration 7 testing completed: Account Rules (Regras de Definição de Contas) feature fully tested. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%), 1 skipped (existing layout not found). Frontend: All UI flows working correctly including AccountRulesBuilder in LayoutForm with templates, rules, conditions, and E2E layout creation.

minor.issue: Passing empty array regras_conta=[] does not remove existing rules (interpreted as None due to falsy check)
minor.workaround: To remove all rules, you can replace with a single dummy rule then delete the layout, or update the controller to handle empty arrays

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: POST /api/v1/import-layouts creates layout WITH regras_conta (single rule)
✅ Backend: POST /api/v1/import-layouts creates layout with multiple regras_conta (Por sinal do valor template: 2 rules)
✅ Backend: POST /api/v1/import-layouts creates layout with D/C operators (dc_debito, dc_credito)
✅ Backend: POST /api/v1/import-layouts creates layout with multiple conditions (AND logic)
✅ Backend: POST /api/v1/import-layouts creates layout with coluna_excel direct reference
✅ Backend: GET /api/v1/import-layouts/{id} returns regras_conta correctly
✅ Backend: PUT /api/v1/import-layouts/{id} adds regras_conta to existing layout
✅ Backend: PUT /api/v1/import-layouts/{id} modifies existing regras_conta
✅ Backend: PUT /api/v1/import-layouts/{id} replaces regras_conta (2 → 1 rule)
✅ Backend: Operators positivo and negativo work correctly
✅ Backend: Operators igual and diferente work correctly
✅ Backend: Operators contem and nao_contem work correctly
✅ Backend: Operators dc_debito and dc_credito work correctly
✅ Backend: GET /api/v1/import-layouts list includes regras_conta in response
✅ Frontend: Layout form (/layouts/novo) displays 'Regras de Definição de Contas' section
✅ Frontend: AccountRulesBuilder component renders with proper structure
✅ Frontend: 'Nova Regra' button adds new account rule
✅ Frontend: Templates available: 'Por sinal do valor', 'Por coluna D/C', 'Por conteúdo de coluna', 'Por combinação de colunas'
✅ Frontend: Clicking template 'Por sinal do valor' creates 2 rules
✅ Frontend: Rule panels are expandable/collapsible
✅ Frontend: Rule name, conditions, conta_debito, conta_credito inputs work
✅ Frontend: 'E (AND)' button adds conditions within a rule
✅ Frontend: Rules can be removed with trash button
✅ Frontend: Rules can be moved up/down with arrows
✅ Frontend: Rules can be duplicated with copy button
✅ Frontend: Upload form (/upload) page loads correctly
✅ Frontend: AccountRulesBuilder available in Upload flow (Step 3: new layout mode after file upload)
✅ E2E: Create layout with account rules through UI → saves successfully → navigates to list with success toast
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: In layout_controller.py line 231, the condition 'if request.regras_conta else None' treats empty list [] as falsy, preventing clearing of regras_conta. Consider using 'if request.regras_conta is not None' instead.
test_credentials: No auth required. CNPJ for testing: 11222333000181
seed_data_creation: Test layouts created during testing were cleaned up. No permanent seed data created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 tests Account Rules (regras_conta) feature. Key entities: RegraContaLayout (id, nome, ordem, ativo, condicoes[], conta_debito, conta_credito) and CondicaoContaLayout (campo, operador, valor, coluna_excel). Operators: positivo, negativo, igual, diferente, contem, nao_contem, dc_debito, dc_credito. Template patterns: 'Por sinal do valor' creates 2 rules (negativo then positivo), 'Por coluna D/C' creates 2 rules (dc_debito, dc_credito). DynamicParser in dynamic_parser.py evaluates rules in _avaliar_regras_conta (first match wins). Frontend: AccountRulesBuilder.jsx component used in both LayoutForm.jsx and UploadForm.jsx.
